evals.prompt: 帮我建立一个内容引擎：每周从一个核心主题派生出 LinkedIn 帖子、公众号文章和短视频脚本。主题是 AI 在医疗行业的应用。
evals.expected_output: 内容生产系统：核心主题 → 多平台内容变体的结构化流程

evals.prompt: Set up a content repurposing system for my podcast. I record once per week and want content for Twitter, LinkedIn, and a newsletter.
evals.expected_output: Content engine workflow: podcast → multi-channel distribution plan with templates

evals.prompt: I need to produce 20 pieces of content per month for my SaaS product. Help me create a sustainable content system.
evals.expected_output: Content calendar structure and production workflow for consistent output
